title: × dactylocamptis rouyana
intro: × Dactylocamptis rouyana is a rare and endemic hybrid orchid species found primarily in the Mediterranean region, particularly in France and Spain. As an orchid, it belongs to the plant kingdom and is valued for its unique medicinal properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid and flavonoid content. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems, and is believed to possess antioxidant and antimicrobial properties that contribute to its health benefits. × Dactylocamptis rouyana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to exploit its medicinal properties.
